acceptance_criteria:
1. E2E test for happy path passes
2. E2E test for constraint check (soft fail) passes
3. E2E test for constraint assert (hard fail) passes
4. E2E test for missing field passes
5. E2E test verifies metadata accessors work
title: Integration Test: End-to-End Typed Prediction

description: End-to-end tests for TypedRlm. Lives in crates/dspy-rs/tests/.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Phase 7 plan (`dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md`): testing & verification. Create integration test(s) and a verification checklist for RLM behavior (pyclass ergonomics, __baml__/__rlm_schema__ round‑trip, SUBMIT conversion, REPL history, Jupyter semantics).
Likely locations: `crates/dspy-rs/tests/typed_rlm_test.rs` or similar; ensure mock agent for execution where needed.
Acceptance criteria are in `dsrs-vn6.7.8` + `dsrs-vn6.7.7` manual checklist.

title: Phase 7: Testing & Verification
